nonGoals: No code or SDK type changes
No changes to provider catalog JSON
objective: Polish docs/PROVIDER_IDS.md — remove stale huggingface row, fix provider count 26→25, and refine preamble/tone for integrator readability.
planText: In docs/PROVIDER_IDS.md: (1) Remove the huggingface row from the provider table (the canonical providers.json has 25 providers, not 26). (2) Update the count on line 5 from 26 to 25. (3) Polish the preamble/opening paragraph(s) to be crisp, confidence-inspiring, and tuned for an integrator audience — keep it non-normative but authoritative. The deprecation policy, changelog expectation, and stability contract sections below the table need no changes; they are already solid.

nonGoals: No README restructuring beyond adding the link
objective: Add cross-link to docs/PROVIDER_IDS.md in README.md Product Docs list.
planText: In README.md, locate the 'Product Docs' section (which already lists PRD.md, docs/ARCHITECTURE.md, docs/ROADMAP.md, docs/API.md, docs/SCHEMA.md, docs/AMPLIFY_BACKEND_GEN2.md). Add a new bullet: 'Provider ID stability & deprecation policy: docs/PROVIDER_IDS.md'. Ensure the link renders correctly in GitHub-flavored Markdown.

nonGoals: No restructuring of docs/API.md beyond adding the pointer
objective: Add cross-link to docs/PROVIDER_IDS.md in docs/API.md as a related-docs pointer.
planText: In docs/API.md, add a 'See also' or related-docs bullet/link pointing to docs/PROVIDER_IDS.md for the provider-id stability contract and deprecation policy. Place it near the provider-ids section or at the bottom of the file as a related-docs pointer. Ensure the link resolves relative to docs/ (e.g., `[Provider ID stability & deprecation policy](./PROVIDER_IDS.md)`).
